title: Stacco

content.value: Stacco is an AI musical instrument designed to perform with Neural Audio Synthesis. The performer interacts by throwing, displacing and combining magnetic marbles and ferromagnetic objects onto its board.
Stacco embeds the score onto the instrument itself. Tracing paper on the board lets performers sketch meaningful areas in the AI models' latent space directly on the instrument.

_comment_paper: To link a research paper, replace null with: {"title": "Paper Title", "url": "papers/filename.pdf"}

paper.title: Stacco: Exploring the Embodied Perception of Latent Representations in Neural Synthesis

_comment_links: To add external links, add objects like: {"label": "GitHub", "url": "https://..."}
